notes: The spec requires the request URI to be "logically contained" in the realm. "https://storage.example/alice" is a string prefix of "https://storage.example/aliceevil/…" but does not logically contain it: containment holds only at a path-segment boundary.
source: lws-spec@048f4fe core#client-rules (spec-derived; no reference implementation yet)
title: realm containment is logical (path-segment) containment, not naive string prefixing
